notes: Fun fact: Kenya has the largest mobile money ecosystem in the world. M-Pesa processes more transactions annually than PayPal. The innovation happened not because of Silicon Valley, but in spite of it.
highlights: Liked: The hustle culture is real. People build with whatever they have and make it work. Nairobi's tech ecosystem punches above its weight.
Did not like: Infrastructure gaps make simple things harder than they need to be. Reliable internet should not be a luxury.
